project.name: Godrej Majesty
project.description: Godrej Majesty is a premium residential development featuring G+35 luxury towers, smart home automation, and an iconic 27,000 sqft residential clubhouse.
project.long_description: Godrej Majesty stands as an architectural masterpiece and the tallest landmark in Sector 12, Greater Noida West. Developed by the prestigious Godrej Properties, the project spans across 5.25 acres, housing 566 luxurious residences within 4 magnificent skyscrapers rising up to G+35 floors. The project is designed with a prime focus on vertical scale and elegant neoclassical symmetry. Every apartment is pre-wired with state-of-the-art smart home automation systems, including app-controlled video doors, automated lighting, and motion sensors. Built with advanced Mivan/Korean structural technology, the units boast generous 10.5 ft ceiling volumes, centralized VRF air conditioning, modular kitchens with quartz countertops, and premium branded fitments. Nestled along a lush green park-facing layout, the project offers a majestic 27,000 sqft clubhouse, complete with a rooftop sky-pool, fitness center, wellness spa, and curated zen gardens.

builder.name: Godrej Properties Ltd
builder.company_overview: Godrej Properties Limited is a leading listed real estate player in India, bringing the Godrej Group's 125-year-old legacy of trust, innovation, and design excellence to the property landscape. Established in 1990, the developer operates across major metropolitan areas, utilizing cutting-edge sustainable practices and world-class structural technology.
awards: Brand Trust Report Most Trusted Real Estate Brand

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Royal Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with smart automation features
unit_types.description: Premium 3 BHK layout featuring smart motion sensor lights, video door entry systems, Italian marble flooring in living spaces, and expansive balconies overlooking the central park.
whats_included: Italian marble flooring in living room

unit_types.name: 3 BHK + Servant (Royal Grand)
unit_types.subtitle: Expansive 3 BHK with dedicated servant room
unit_types.description: Grand 3 BHK layout offering a separate entrance vestibule, dedicated servant/utility room with toilet, and wrap-around balconies.
whats_included: Italian marble across living and formal dining
Laminated wooden flooring in all rooms

unit_types.name: 4 BHK + Servant (Imperial Suite)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 4 BHK with private elevator vestibule
unit_types.description: The peak of luxury within Godrej Majesty, featuring double-height lounge areas, customized quartz kitchen, and premium fittings.

connectivity.name: Noida Sector 51 Metro Station
connectivity.notes: Connected via 130m Greater Noida link road

assumptions: All prices are based on official Godrej launch directories as of Q3 2026.
GST is applicable at 5% on under-construction residential properties.

payment_plan.notes: Custom payment milestones linked with structural progress.

milestones.milestone: On structural completion of core tower

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Godrej Majesty introduces a new era of royal neoclassical skyscrapers in Sector 12, combining Godrej's flawless brand trust with luxury smart-home automation.
why_buy: Impeccable Brand Equity: 125-year Godrej legacy ensures zero financial default and elite construction quality.
Smart Home Automation: Fully integrated motion-sensor lights, app security, and multi-split AC layouts.
Panoramic Park Vistas: Neoclassical G+35 layout provides outstanding views of the central sports fields.
why_avoid: Extreme Luxury Premium: Starts at nearly ₹2.91 Cr, making it the most expensive under-construction asset per sqft in the area.
Long Handover Horizon: Expected hanovers scheduled for early 2030, leaving a long wait time.
decision_profile.best_for: HNIs, C-suite executives, NRI capital preservers, and corporate upgrades.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Budget first-time buyers under ₹2 Cr, or yield-first investors.

buyerPersonas.headline: Sovereign Gated Safety
reasons: Direct remote registration, transparent escrow, and high-quality construction finishing.

persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear with school children or senior dependants
persona_profile.work_location: Noida expressway IT hubs or MNC corporate hubs
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirational luxury purchase driven by building prestige, premium specifications, and extreme low-density layout.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Godrej Majesty represents Noida Extension's finest premium high-rise address. Combining neoclassical design with smart home setups, it is highly recommended.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Perfect for premium families demanding zero structural or delay risks with elite smart security systems.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Trophy wealth preservation asset. High-end Godrej skyscrapers consistently outperform mid-market flats in capital appreciation.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Exceptional. Neoclassical G+35 layout, rooftop sky pool, massive play areas, and safe car-free grounds.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Highly recommended for investors seeking reliable capital preservation and secondary market liquidity.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Features double-height grand lobbies, pre-fitted VRF conditioning, private lift vestibules, and modular kitchen hubs.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero risk. Strictly regulated ICICI Bank escrow account with 100% RERA clearances.
walk_away_conditions: Strict budget constraints under Rs 2.5 Cr.
negotiation_leverage: Limited due to Godrej's strict corporate pricing policies.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Under construction. Expected handover in 2030. Act now to secure early pre-launch launch slots before subsequent milestone hikes.
